hooks.command: ConvertTo-Json @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='SessionStart';additionalContext=('Current date and time: ' + (Get-Date -Format 'dddd, MMMM d, yyyy HH:mm') + '. Use this exact date when constructing web searches or reasoning about current tools, versions, or events.')}}
